summary: Testing completed for two features: 1) 'Stay logged in' (remember_me) checkbox on login page, 2) ImageLightbox swipe gesture support. All backend tests passed (5/5). All frontend tests passed. Both features fully implemented and working.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login without remember_me field defaults to 24h expiry (86400s)
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with remember_me=false returns 24h expiry token
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with remember_me=true returns 14-day expiry token (1209600s)
Backend: Token is valid and works for authenticated requests
Backend: Login response has correct structure (access_token, token_type, user)
Frontend: Login page shows 'Stay logged in' checkbox with data-testid='remember-me-checkbox'
Frontend: Checkbox is between password field and 'Forgot password?' link (same row)
Frontend: Checkbox is unchecked by default
Frontend: Login works with remember_me unchecked - token stored in sessionStorage
Frontend: Login works with remember_me checked - token stored in localStorage
Frontend: Swipe left triggers goNext(), swipe right triggers goPrev()
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py (services): create_token correctly uses 24*14 hours for remember_me=true, JWT_EXPIRATION_HOURS for false
auth.py (models): UserLogin model has remember_me: bool = False for backward compatibility
auth.py (routes): Correctly passes data.remember_me to create_token
LoginPage.jsx: rememberMe state with Checkbox component, passed to login() function
AuthContext.js: login() accepts rememberMe param, clears both storages first, then stores in localStorage (rememberMe=true) or sessionStorage (rememberMe=false)
ImageLightbox.jsx: Touch handlers implemented with useRef for touchStartRef and touchDeltaRef, 50px threshold for swipe detection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Remember Me feature: Backend creates JWT with 24h expiry (default/remember_me=false) or 14-day expiry (remember_me=true). Frontend stores token in sessionStorage (unchecked) or localStorage (checked). AuthContext checks both storages on init. ImageLightbox swipe: Container div has onTouchStart/onTouchMove/onTouchEnd handlers. Swipe threshold is 50px. Swipe left = next image, swipe right = previous image. Key data-testids: remember-me-checkbox, login-email-input, login-password-input, login-submit-button, forgot-password-link.
